goal: Define a compatibility-preserving migration baseline for separating the repo's four product surfaces without breaking the current CLI or manifest contract.
constraints: Do not move source files in this tranche
Keep the current hook contract as the compatibility layer
behavioral_changes: The repo now has a concrete module-to-surface migration baseline for future package work.
The execution plan now includes a package-boundary preparation phase after the original six phases.
Future refactors can use the documented migration order instead of doing opportunistic file moves.
follow_up: If package separation proceeds, start with internal subpackages and compatibility imports rather than a repo-wide rename.
Use the migration plan as the checklist for any future module moves.
